---
name: "Implementation Task"
about: "Use this template to describe a development task/feature implementation"
title: "[Task] Short descriptive title"
labels: ["task", "implementation"]
---

## 📝 Summary
_A short one-sentence summary of the task_

## 🎯 Goal
_What problem does this solve / what do we want to achieve?_

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria
_What should be true when this task is done?_
- [ ] Design accepted (if needed)
- [ ] Functionality works as described
- [ ] Tests are added/updated
- [ ] Manual tests are performed
- [ ] Documentation is updated (if needed)

## 📋 Proposed Steps / Notes
_Outline how it can be done, if known_
1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three

## 🔗 Related (optional)
- Related to #ISSUE_NUMBER
- See also: link to design / docs / discussions

## ⚖️ Effort / Priority (optional)
- Effort: S / M / L
- Priority: Low / Medium / High
